name: Moonwell Pilgrim

items.name: Equipment:
items.entry: Choose A or B: (A) {@item Quarterstaff|XPHB}, {@item Painter's Supplies|XPHB}, {@item Bedroll|XPHB}, {@item Bell|XPHB}, {@item Pouch|XPHB}, {@item Robe|XPHB}, {@item String|XPHB}, {@item Traveler's Clothes|XPHB}, {@item Waterskin|XPHB}, 38 GP; or (B) 50 GP

fluff: Like many who hail from the Moonshae Isles, you grew up revering the blessed land, its unique gods, and the mysterious shrines called the moonwells. As a moonwell pilgrim, you undertook a quest to visit and commune with every moonwell on (or off) the map. Along your idyllic journeys, you collected a repertoire of Moonshavian folk songs, painted landscapes of enchanting vistas, and even learned how to wield a bit of primal magic.
